English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Carolynne Cline papers
Cline, Carolynne Helen, 1915-1985.
37-5-2112
2.4 cubic feet. 2.4 cubic feet. 4 tape recordings, 2 transcripts.,
1933-1984. Correspondence, course papers, scrapbooks, photograph albums, Cornelliana, memorabilia, films, audiotapes, and transcripts. Collection consists of correspondence; college course work; scrapbooks; photograph albums; Cornelliana; memorabilia; two movie films pertaining to Carol Cline's senior year, Robert Cline, parents, graduation, and the Class of 1937 reunion in 1939; two tapes and transcripts of a commentary on the films, a photograph album, and two scrapbooks; two tapes of the Class of 1939 Women's Reunion, 1964; and two tapes of "Carol's Corner" interviews with Cornell-affiliated people. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 97 98 374 ======= 97 98 374 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2080110
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
March 1985
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, March 2004
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Carol Cline was the Life Secretary of the Cornell Class of 1937 Women. She had a radio program in Dayton, Ohio called "Carol's Corner."
Cornell University Class of 1937.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection consists of correspondence; college course work; scrapbooks; photograph albums; Cornelliana; memorabilia; two movie films pertaining to Carol Cline's senior year, Robert Cline, parents, graduation, and the Class of 1937 reunion in 1939; two tapes and transcripts of a commentary on the films, a photograph album, and two scrapbooks; two tapes of the Class of 1939 Women's Reunion, 1964; and two tapes of "Carol's Corner" interviews with Cornell-affiliated people. Correspondents include family members, Helen Fry and other women of the Class of 1937, S. "Tom" Boon Long, and "Nifty Nine" Round Robin letters.
NOTES
Related collection:Cornell University. Class of 1937 Women. Records, #41-4-738.
Cite As:
Carolynne Cline papers, #37-05-2112. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Long, Tom. Scrapbooks. Russia -- Description and travel. Central America -- Description and travel. Women college students -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Women broadcasters. Class reunions. Cline, Robert. Fry, Helen. Long, S. Boon. Cornell University -- : Alumni. Cornell University. Class of 1937 Women Cornell University. Class of 1937
